title: Enable admin users to change user status

requirements.summary: Add a status change dropdown in the UserStatusManagement component that allows admins to modify user status in addition to roles
acceptanceCriteria: Status dropdown is visible in the user management table
Only admins can see and use the status change controls

file_operations.description: Add a status change dropdown column to the user management table. Use the same UI pattern as the existing role dropdown. Include a Select component for UserStatus (active, inactive, suspended, banned) that calls the useSetUserStatus hook when changed. Display the current user status in the table. Ensure the status dropdown is only visible to authenticated admin users.

requirements.summary: Create useSetUserStatus React hook that wraps the backend setUserStatus method and invalidates relevant queries on success
acceptanceCriteria: Hook follows the same pattern as useSetUserRole
Query invalidation refreshes the user list after status changes
Toast notifications show success or error messages

file_operations.description: Create a mutation hook that calls actor.updateUserStatus(target, newStatus) from the backend interface. Follow the same pattern as useSetUserRole: use useMutation from React Query, accept target Principal and newStatus UserStatus parameters, invalidate the 'allUserRoles' query on success, and show toast notifications for success and error states. Handle async/await properly and ensure error messages are user-friendly.
